title: laportea stolonifera
intro: Laportea stolonifera, also known as the wild betel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Urticaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, including the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Laportea stolonifera include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties and relieve various health issues.
